'''AT-TE Tank Gunners''' were elite [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and received [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC]] training. They operated [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and other armored vehicles. They wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] shoulder pauldron and helmet pads.<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Appearances==
*{{TCW|Downfall of a Droid}}
*{{TCW|Liberty on Ryloth}}
*{{TCW|The Zillo Beast}}
